entry.title: Re: SAP RE-FX IFRS 16: Valuation Cash Flow Per Condition Type

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative voucher
entry.content: Dear @David_Chaviano , would it be possible to reply this question? thank you! Galina

entry.title: Optional parameters for OData Functions or Actions in cds definition (CAP with Java)
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 

I'm working on a BTP service using CAP with Java, and need some help with OData functions. Here's a simplified version of what I have in my `service.cds`:

function testfunction(id: String, secondparam: String) returns String;

The issue I'm facing is that both `id` and `secondparam` are required parameters. However, I want secondparam to be optional. Currently, if I omit `secondparam` when calling the function, I get an error.

Does anyone know how to make the `secondparam` optional in this case? Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance! 😊

entry.title: Re: Signavio overview user and used licences
entry.content: Our approach, specifically for Modelers since we have a limited number of Enterprise Plus Edition licenses, is to assign users to Groups based on the license assigned. This permits us to see the users in the User Management > Groups page, or via Suite Reports > User/Group Management.

entry.title: how to connect to Postgresql (backing service) database from SAP BAS sqlTools (PostGres)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I enabled Postgresql hyperscapler instance and created service key.  I would like to connect to this instance from SAP BAS with SQL tools option.  But I am unable to connect to this instance.  Can you help.

Thanks 

Ravi

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Integration Strategy - Integration Solution Advisory Methodology (ISA-M)
entry.content:
@Mujtaba_SAP  Thank you for your thoughtful comment, below is the response for your mentioned queries,

  1. How does it guide integration with mixed SAP/non-SAP systems?
    ISA-M provides a structured approach using standardized patterns and tools like SAP Integration Suite to bridge diverse systems. For instance, it’s been used to integrate e-commerce platforms with SAP ERP to streamline order processing and inventory management.

  2. Balancing Agility with Governance?
    By promoting clear API design principles and governance policies, ISA-M ensures flexibility without compromising control. A good example is financial institutions leveraging ISA-M to govern APIs while enabling agile digital banking services.

  3. Measuring Implementation Success?
    Success is measured by aligning KPIs with business goals. Common metrics include system uptime, data consistency, and integration efficiency. For example, a manufacturing company integrating IoT with SAP might measure success by reduced downtime and improved maintenance predictions.

I appreciate your suggestion about real-world examples! I’ll definitely incorporate more in a follow-up post. Thanks again for the thoughtful feedback!

entry.title: PMGM: Comment entered includes coding
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we have a case where a manager entered a comment in the performance form into the "Manager Comment's Box". He afterwards switched the system language to "English Debug" and back to his initial language. The comment in the "Manager Comment's Box" afterwards displayed in a weird way.

Any idea why it is showing all these codes?

Thank you for your help.

Kind regards

entry.title: SAP RAP/Fiori Elements Increase Visible Items on Object Page
entry.content:
Hi,

I've a managed RAP application with a child entity rendered as a table on the object page. By default the RAP framework displays only 5 items in the table. Is there a way I can have more items in one screen? I've tried enabling the full screen function through BAS during deployment and unfortunately only 5 items are displayed on the enlarged screen as well. I'm assuming this would be a common requirement and SAP would have given a way to deal with this. Suggestions please. We are on S/4HANA 2022.

Best Regard,

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: Formatting DateTime Columns in Story Analytics (Repor...
entry.content:
Hi @skusulja ,

To fetch only date try like below

TODATE(CONCAT(TOTEXT(YEAR([Date] )) ,
CONCAT("/" , CONCAT(TOTEXT(MONTH([Date] )) ,
CONCAT("/" ,TOTEXT(DAY([Date] )) ) )) ), "yyyy/mm/dd" )

Regards,

Subbu

entry.title: Re: Send Material in Full - Change Pointers option in BD10
entry.content:
@hdgran , o módulo de função da mensagem MATMAS_CFS  realmente dispara o IDOC completo na BD10 e BD21. Sua solução atende perfeitamente!!

obrigada por compartilhar!!

entry.title: We are looking to purchase a TDD license but would like to understand which license should we buy.
entry.content:
We are looking to purchase a TDD license but would like to understand which license option would best suit our needs.

Could you please provide guidance on which TDD license we should consider?

entry.title: Re: New Learning Experience home page - team members have...
entry.content: Hi vijdhara, the issue still exists, even worse - the reminder had not be sent, other way: neither the employee nor the manager (in Cc:) received the notification. I tested it again onTuesday, thats why I am a little bit late with my answer. SAP support suggested to read KBA2087468 and KBA 2149831 and closed the ticket. Our IT created an own domain (@email.company.com) for this purpose, but also not successful.

entry.title: Issue with nested if-then formula in compensation worksheet
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Need your help in below issue. I have used below nested-if formula used for a custom field Current Pay Bucket. After launching the form, the field shows N/A (which is a standard SF value for Not applicable). If I input merit or promotion, then the field is populated correctly as per formula below. If the worksheet is saved or refreshed the value is again going away. Please help.

if(payGuideMin>0 && payGuideMax>0 && customCurRate>0 && customDefLocale !="" ,
if(customDefLocale="en_US" || customDefLocale="en_GB",
if(customCurRate<payGuideMin,"Below Min",
if(customCurRate>payGuideMax,"Above Max",
if(curRatio>0 && curRatio<90,"Developing",
if(curRatio>89.999 && curRatio<110,"Competitive",
if(curRatio>109.999,"Above Market",
"NA")))))),
if(customDefLocale="es_MX",
if(customCurRate<payGuideMin,"Por debajo del mínimo",
if(customCurRate>payGuideMax,"Por encima del máximo",
if(curRatio>0 && curRatio<90,"En desarrollo",
if(curRatio>89.999 && curRatio<110,"Competitivo",
if(curRatio>109.999,"Por encima del mercado",
"NA")))))),
if(customDefLocale="fr_CA",
if(customCurRate<payGuideMin,"En dessous du minimum",
if(customCurRate>payGuideMax,"Au-dessus du maximum",
if(curRatio>0 && curRatio<90,"En cours de perfectionnement",
if(curRatio>89.999 && curRatio<110,"Compétitif",
if(curRatio>109.999,"Supérieur au marché",
"S.O.")))))),
"No Pay Range or Default Locale")

 

Thanks,

Swagatika

@xavierlegarrec

entry.title: how change pointers are created in BDCP2 for table AUSP and field classificationchange for ARTMAS
entry.content:
Hi ,

we are facing an issue whereas BDCP2 has change pointers for table AUSP and field classificationchange for ARTMAS message type.

we dont need them but they get created even without a change in classification for that article and then processed ,sometime even with lesser segment in ARTMAS idoc. Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to Import /BIC/* tables"s data between P and...
entry.content: You don't! You should have P and Q source systems, and connect a Q BW to a Q source and so on.

entry.title: Re: Billing blocks for cancelled deliveries in S/4 Public...
entry.content: Hi Vivek, thank you for answer. I'm not sure that your solution is full appropriate because on that way we always have open delivery note which can be posted again. We need to totally close delivery note and blocked for billing. In SAP on premise version we have transaction vl_complete which close delivery notes without billing. Do you maybe know on which way is covered that case in public cloud version? BR, Milica

Linda

If you've partner portal access, you can find list of TDD and Pricing and also POC whom you can contact and discuss.

Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG: For Change CR Type - while changing any fiel...
entry.content:
Hi @SugguSandeep ,

You can try using the cross-entity derivation BADI. You can read the changed data using the IO_CHANGED_DATA parameter and write the required message in the ET_MESSAGE_INFO parameter, based on your requirements. However, this message will appear as an informational message on the UI.
To change the information message into an error message, you can refer to the blog below.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/allow-error-messages-for-mdg-rule-derivation-badi/ba-p/13374765 

Best Regards,
Aditya

entry.title: Re: Doubt for optimize abap code in BADI
entry.content:
Your code is a bit confusing.

  • Comparing the first code snippet to the second one:
    In the first snippet you loop over the incoming table and etract start and end date as well as the id and then select on HRP1013 with mandant, planvariant, id and the date range
  • The second snippet does some sort of weird entry swapping. If there are more than or exactly 2 entries it swaps the last 2 entries and puts only those two entries in the lt_fin table. If there is only one entry it just takes that one entry. In the part below that you check if lt_fin is not empty and if this is the case you perform the select

Can you explain what the swapping is used for?

To me there is little change in general, just some re-formating going on. In order to give an answer to your question on what you can do better I’d say

  • In the SQL statement use the BETWEEN keyword when comparing date values so you don’t need to use brackets and comparsion operators and it’s more type safe (assuming the DB field and the comparing values are of type D)
  • In the second code snippet, you check if lt_fin is not empty and regardless of it being empty or not you use the result oft he following SQL statement for processing the data. Here you should either include the data processing in the IF context or you do a return code check if the SQL statement actually returns any value. If you don’t do this you could get into the situation where the query returns no values, setting sy-subrc to 4 and you work with the data from the previous iteration. You should also CLEAR the tables before

entry.title: Re: Dynamic HTTP or Odata Adapter – SAP Cloud Integration – CI/CPI
entry.content:
Hello,

What user are you using for the OData adapter? Or where is it created?

entry.title: Re: Need help on User exit in CJ20N at componant level
entry.content:
Relevant Enhancements in SMOD

Dear Madhusudanc,

In SMOD, you will find the following three enhancements:

  • CNEX0037: Checks for a newly created component.
  • CNEX0038: Checks for changes made to a component.
  • CNEX0039: Checks for the deletion of a component within a network.

I believe these enhancements will be helpful to you.

Best regards,
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: How do we get SF to mark the SCORM as complete for pa...

entry.title: Re: INVOIC IDoc processing of Intercompany billing (IV)
entry.content:
@Jigang_Zhang张吉刚  Thanks for providing  this post. I need some help for updating the Idoc field E1EDK01-KUNDEUINR into field BSEG-STWEG via customer function 101. Could you please provide any sample code which can be used for this purpose. I believe in this case we need to populate the BDC table correctly. I tried via debugging by adding a record into internal table DOCUMENT_DATA however the BDC is giving error. Could you please help in this regard.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP BW Query - You do not have the authorization for the selected component
entry.content:
Hello SAP BW Security Experts,

we have implemented a new query on a new DSO object.
Working all fine for admin users but for business users with restricted authorization the bellow error is displayed.

First I thought access to infoarea is the problem so added to respective profile the approriated infoarea. But even if I give * for infoarea in the profile error message remains.

What is really confusing (for me) is that su53  / st01  displayes BIAUTH  0BIALL missing.

Although there is no authorization relevant infoobject in the DSO at all (check bellow with admin user rsecadmin).

Any ideas what is wrong?

Thanks and best regards
Axel

entry.title: Production Receipt performed without performing issue from production
entry.content:
Performed production receipt from Production order without performing issue from production and now after performing issue from production Actual Product Cost is showing 0 under summary tab of production order , is there any way to revert back the document so that Actual Product Cost can show the proper amount ?

Need guidance in this.

entry.title: Seamless Deployment of Virtual DM Edge on Azure Kubernetes Service
entry.content:
The manufacturing landscape is changing faster than ever, and at the forefront of this transformation is edge computing powered by the cloud. In this blog post, we’ll guide you through the process of deploying Virtual DM Edge - a cloud-based solution that brings the magic of edge computing to your Azure subscription. Plus, we’ll show you how this approach streamlines everything, leaving you with more time to focus on what truly matters - making cool stuff!

The Virtual DM Edge Approach: Cloud Convenience Without the Hardware Hassle 

While traditional edge computing often requires physical hardware, Virtual DM Edge lets you skip all that setup. This approach deploys DM Edge on your Azure data center, so you don't have to worry about maintaining physical machines. Whether you're dealing with tight budgets or simply don’t have time to fuss with hardware, Virtual DM Edge is the perfect solution.

Who Should Use Virtual DM Edge?

  • No hardware headaches: If your organization doesn’t want to deal with the time and cost of procuring and maintaining hardware, this is your go-to.
  • Low latency, no problem: Virtual DM Edge is ideal for those who don’t face major latency or bandwidth challenges.
  • Self-managers: Already rocking Kubernetes infrastructure on the cloud? Then Customer Managed Virtual Edge is right up your alley.
  • Quick start for Proof of concepts

Let’s Dive In: How to Install Virtual DM Edge on AKS

Alright, now it’s time for the fun part—installing Virtual DM Edge on your Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) cluster. Don’t worry, we’ve got your back with this easy-to-follow guide. Let's break it down step by step.

Prerequisites:

Before diving into the installation, make sure you’ve got these tools and permissions set up:

  1. Edge_Admin role in your SAP BTP subaccount
  2. RBSC configuration access
  3. Helm and kubectl installed
    Helm Installation Guide
    kubectl Installation Guide
  4. Images from RBSC downloaded (if a local container repository is required)

Step 1:Create and Access Your AKS Cluster

  1. Create a standard 2 or 3 node pool AKS cluster in your Azure subscription
  2. Obtain public domain names mapped to fixed IPs for your cluster: hostname and edge-ui.hostname.
    “your-cluster-hostname” and “edge-ui.your-cluster-hostname”
  3. Ensure that the cluster has at least one storage class, and persistent volumes can be automatically provisioned.
  4. Access the cluster via the Azure CLI or kubectl tool and follow the instructions provided in the Azure tenant.
  5. Download the cluster credentials and set the context to your kube config using a set or export command.
  6. Generate or obtain a server certificate for the ingress gateway and prepare a client certificate that is signed for a technical user "dm-edge-services.” Ensure that the private keys are included. You'll also need the CA certificates signing the server certificate and the client certificate for some configurations.

Step 2: Ingress Installation (Choose Your Fighter: Istio vs. Nginx)

Ingress controllers are what help route your traffic to the right places in Kubernetes. You’ve got two choices:

  • Istio (Recommended): A powerful service mesh for managing microservices. Ideal if you're looking to scale fast!
  • Nginx: A more traditional choice for handling HTTP/HTTPS traffic.

Istio (Recommended):

As there are many ways to install Istio, select a method that is best suited to you and your organisation. Below is the procedure for one method.

  1. Download Istio.
    curl -L https://istio.io/downloadIstio | sh -
  2. Enter the Istio directory.
    cd istio-<version>
  3. Install Istio using istioctl.
    istioctl install --set profile=default
  4. Verify the istio Installation.
    kubectl get pods -n istio-system

Nginx:

  1. Add a chart repository named as ingress-nginx.
    helm repo add ingress-nginx https://kubernetes.github.io/ingress-nginx
  2. Install the preferred version of ingress-nginx on your cluster in a dedicated namespace.
    helm search repo ingress-nginx/ingress-nginx -l
    helm install ingress-nginx ingress-nginx/ingress-nginx --version x.x.x --set controller.service.externalTrafficPolicy=Local -n ingress-nginx --create-namespace
  3. Ensure the cluster IP and external IP are mapped to the load balancer of the ingress.


If the external IP is not automatically mapped, edit and add the IP to the service (svc).

kubectl edit svc ingress-svc-name -n your-ingress-namespace

This will open the svc and enter appropriate command based on your OS specifications to edit the svc Vim file. Add the external IPs in specs section

4. Update the hosts file of your system with permissible IP and hostnames for your cluster to obtain local access.

IP  your-hostname
IP edge-ui.your-hostname

Note: The hosts file can be found at the following locations:

  • Linux: /etc/hosts
  • Windows: C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts

5. Ensure the ingress setup is successful in the AZ subscription.

Step 3: Generating self-signed certificate

Every good digital ecosystem needs security, and that’s where certificates come in. Here’s how to generate them:

  1. Create a CA certificate (the certificate authority for your self-signed certs).
  2. Generate server and client certificates using OpenSSL.

It’s easier than it sounds—just follow the steps to create the keys and certificates, ensuring your traffic remains secure!

  1. Generate a CA key pair (ca.key) and CA certificate (ca.crt).
openssl req -x509 -sha256 -newkey rsa:4096 -keyout ca.key -out ca.crt -days 365 -nodes -subj "/CN=Custom Cert Authority"

2. Generate a server key pair (server.key) and sign the server certificate signing request (server.csr) with the CA certificate.

server.csr
[req]
distinguished_name = req_distinguished_name
prompt = no

[req_distinguished_name]
C = YourCountry (in two capitals)
ST = YourStateOrProvince
L = YourLocation
O = YourOrganization
OU = YourOrganizationUnit
CN = dm-edge

[v3_req]
keyUsage=critical,digitalSignature,keyEncipherment
extendedKeyUsage=serverAuth
subjectAltName = _names
[alt_names]
DNS.1 = your-hostname
DNS.2 = edge-ui.your-hostname​

3. Create a certificate signing request (CSR) and verify the content.

openssl req -new -newkey rsa:4096 -keyout server.key -out server.csr -nodes -config server_csr.cnf -extensions v3_reqopenssl req -text -noout -verify -in server.csr

4. Sign the CSR (server.csr) using the CA certificate and its private key.

openssl x509 -req -sha256 -days 365 -in server.csr -CA ca.crt -CAkey ca.key -set_serial 01 -out server.crt -extfile server_csr.cnf -extensions v3_req

5. Generate a client key pair (client.key) and sign the client CSR (client.csr) with the CA certificate.

openssl req -new -newkey rsa:4096 -keyout client.key -out client.csr -nodes -subj "/CN=dm-edge-services"
openssl x509 -req -sha256 -days 365 -in client.csr -CA ca.crt -CAkey ca.key -set_serial 02 -out client.crt

Step 4: Create Edge Device in DM Cloud UI

Now, let’s create an Edge device in the Manage Edge Devices UI in the SAP Cloud.

  1. Name your device, select the plant, and choose your deployment option (Self-Managed).
  2. Download the parameter values yaml file.

Step 5: Prepare Your YAML File 📄

The YAML file contains all the configurations for your deployment. You’ll populate it with the necessary parameters, then refer to the SAP help documentation for the specifics.

Step 6: Install DM Edge with Helm

  1.  Set the Kubernetes context.
    export KUBECONFIG=[kubeconfig_file_path]
    Note: For Windows, the command is set KUBECONFIG=[kubeconfig_file_path]
  2. Create a namespace for SAP Digital Manufacturing for edge computing.
    kubectl create namespace [namespace]
  3. [Required for Istio] Enable Istio for the namespace.
    kubectl label namespace [namespace] istio-injection=enabled
  4. [Only for Istio] Verify the istio injection in the namespace.
    kubectl get ns -L istio-injection

5. Add a chart repository for the SAP Digital Manufacturing for edge computing Helm chart. Add a chart repository, using the repository endpoint and the technical username and password for the RBSC or your own container registry.

helm repo add [helm_repo] [helm_chart_URL] --username *** --password *** --pass-credentials

The helm_repo parameter is the name you give to a local Helm chart repository. The helm_chart_URL parameter is obtained from RBSC.

6. Check the latest version of the Helm chart.

helm search repo [helm_repo]/offline-edge --versions

Note: If you are testing beta versions, which are reserved for the quality testing window before official release, add the "--devel" option.

7. Check the configurable values of the chart.

helm show values [helm_repo]/offline-edge --version [version]

8. Create Kubernetes secrets to store different certificates. For NGINX, create all the following secrets in SAP Digital Manufacturing for edge computing namespace. For Istio, create the first two secrets (all in one secret) in Istio namespace and the third in SAP Digital Manufacturing for edge computing namespace.

1. Secret for trusted certificates, including CA certificate for SAP Digital Manufacturing for edge computing client certificate and CA certificate for Cloud Connector system certificate. Or if it's a self-signed system certificate for PoC purposes, include the Cloud Connector system certificate itself.

2. Secret for SAP Digital Manufacturing for edge computing server certificate.

3. Secret for CA certificate for Dex server certificate (in the case of embedded Dex, secret for CA certificate for SAP Digital Manufacturing for edge computing server certificate).

NGINX:

kubectl create secret generic [ca_secret_name] --from-file=ca.crt=[trusted_ca_certificates] -n [dm_edge_namespace]
kubectl create secret tls [tls_secret_name] --key [server_certificate_key] --cert [server_certificate] -n [dm_edge_namespace]
kubectl create secret generic [dex-ca-secret-name] --from-file=ca.crt=[Dex_CA_Certificate] -n [dm_edge_namespace]

Istio:

kubectl create secret generic [tls_secret_name] --from-file=tls.key=[server_certificate_key] --from-file=tls.crt=[server_certificate] --from-file=ca.crt=[trusted_ca_certificates] -n [istio_namespace]
kubectl create secret generic [dex-ca-secret-name] --from-file=ca.crt=[Dex_CA_Certificate] -n [dm_edge_namespace]

6. Install the application using Helm.

helm install [release_name] [helm_repo]/offline-edge -f [values_file] -n [namespace] –-version [helm_chart_version]

The release_name parameter is a name you give to the SAP Digital Manufacturing for edge computing instance to be installed.

7. When installation is complete, check the pod status in the given namespace.

kubectl get pods -n [namespace]

The pods should be in Running status and jobs in Completed status. Additionally, you can verify the installation status in the Manage Edge Devices UI. The status should say "Installed."

Step 7: Set up Azure Lighthouse (Optional)

Azure Lighthouse is a service offered by Microsoft for service providers that offers multi-tenant management with enhanced scalability, automation, and governance. It allows customers to share their resource logs, including Azure Monitor logs and activity logs, with providers using delegated resource management. Providers can access this data through Azure RBAC, ensuring secure, controlled access. This service helps streamline monitoring, troubleshooting, and optimization, while maintaining customer data privacy.

Therefore, these steps are optional but highly recommended for efficient resource management and enhanced service delivery.

  1. In Azure subscription, navigate to custom template: template.
  2. Choose Edit Parameters.

     

  3. In the Edit Parameters section, replace the content with the below JSON.

 

 

 

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentParameters.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "mspOfferName": {
      "value": "DMC_Lighthouse_Test_MSP_Security"
    },
    "mspOfferDescription": {
      "value": "DMC Lighthouse Test Service Provider"
    },
    "managedByTenantId": {
      "value": "[managed_by_tenant_id]"
    },
    "authorizations": {
      "value": [
        {
          "principalId": "[principal_id]",
          "roleDefinitionId": "[role_definition_id]",
          "principalIdDisplayName": "Lighthouse Contributor"
        },
        {
          "principalId": "[principal_id]",
          "roleDefinitionId": "[role_definition_id]",
          "principalIdDisplayName": "Lighthouse Managed Services Registration Assignment Delete Role"
        }
      ]
    },
    "rgName": {
      "value": "[nameof-your-resource-groups]"
    }
  }
}

 

 

 

  • mspOfferName: A unique name for your Lighthouse offer.
  • mspOfferDescription: A description of the offer (e.g., "DMC Lighthouse Test Service Provider").
  • managedByTenantId: The Tenant ID of the managed service provider (MSP).
  • principalId: The Principal ID (the ID of the service principal or managed identity).
  • roleDefinitionId: The role definition that will be assigned to the service provider.
  • rgName: The name of the resource group that will be used in this configuration.

Important:
Replace [managed_by_tenant_id], [principal_id], [role_definition_id], and [nameof-your-resource-groups] with actual values. These details must be provided by the DM Edge team (or your internal team managing Azure Lighthouse).

Navigate through the wizard and click on “Review + create” to create the custom deployment template.

  • To verify the Azure Lighthouse configurations, navigate to Home > Azure Lighthouse.
  • Choose View service provider offers.

     


  • Click on service providers from the list to view their details and role assignments.

    Role Assignments

Conclusion: Your Edge Computing Journey Starts Here 🚀

With Virtual DM Edge, you’re now equipped to take full advantage of edge computing in your manufacturing operations. This powerful technology not only accelerates decision-making but also drives real-time improvements on the shop floor—without the hassle of managing physical hardware.

Here are a few key takeaways to remember as you embark on this journey:

  • Zero Hardware Hassles: Virtual DM Edge allows you to deploy SAP’s edge computing capabilities directly in your Azure data center, saving you time and resources spent on physical infrastructure.

  • Faster Decisions, Smarter Operations: By processing data closer to the source, edge computing reduces latency, enabling faster, more accurate responses to production needs.

  • Seamless Integration: Thanks to a containerized approach powered by Kubernetes, scaling and managing your applications is easier than ever, giving you the flexibility you need to grow without compromise.

  • Security First: By using self-signed certificates and robust ingress controllers (like Istio or Nginx), you can ensure that all your edge operations stay secure while communicating effectively with the cloud.

  • Efficient Resource Management: If you’re a service provider, consider setting up Azure Lighthouse to streamline monitoring, troubleshooting, and optimization across multiple tenants. It’s an optional step, but it significantly enhances your ability to manage resources efficiently.

With these benefits in hand, your organization is now on the fast track to harnessing the full power of edge computing for manufacturing. Whether you’re looking to improve business continuity, scale quickly, or simply eliminate infrastructure headaches, Virtual DM Edge provides the flexibility, speed, and reliability you need to succeed.

Ready to dive deeper into edge computing? For more insights and the latest updates, click on SAP help documentation to stay on top of all things SAP Digital Manufacturing!

Happy edge computing! 🌐

entry.title: SAP ABAP Proxy to PO - large data error
entry.content:
Hi

I have an ABAP Consumer Proxy interface. When i call with data size i.eg <SAP:MessageSizeTotal>86626719</SAP:MessageSizeTotal> it´s doing okay. 

But when i do a similar call but with size:

<SAP:MessageSizeTotal>124938066</SAP:MessageSizeTotal>

I get an 500 Network Connection Broken in SXMB_MONI? 

I have changed icm/HTTP/max_request_size_KB to 204800 in ABAP
And messaging.largemessage.threshold to 204800 in SAP PO

With no luck. Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Tax code template
entry.content:
got you the resolution for this question?

 

I have the same problem.

"error": {

            "lang": "en-us",
            "value": "Enter valid code  [OSTC.TfcId]"

    }

I have activated the inspection type for the material. 

But still throwing this error while releasing the shopfloor routing in MSFR1

Any idea?

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam: Una Experiencia que Paraguay Necesita
entry.content:
Hola, saludos desde Brasil. Es muy bueno que haya una iniciativa en Paraguay para fortalecer la comunidad local.

Codejam es un buen tema, y es un evento tradicional de SAP para llevar nuevas ideas por el mundo. Tuvimos un roadshow en América del Sur en 2024

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/sap-codejam-roadshow-2024-latin-america-edition-august-8th-21st-2024/ba-p/13710015

Creo que vale contactar a los desarrolladores que presentaron el CodeJam y incluir a Asunción en la agenda de este año 2025. Un abrazo.

entry.title: SAP BUILD APP: Error in the build(iOS)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to deploy from SAP Build Apps|Free Edition an application and the system generates an error:

AB version: 3.5.0
COMMAND: 

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true  npxrnv repackage-ios -p ios -s standalone_adhoc -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-120773\"" --offline --templates-path /Users/iosbuilder/templates --keychain-path /Users/iosbuilder/Library/Keychains/AppGyver-120773-db --provisioning-profile-path /Users/iosbuilder/current/certs/bs_secrets_120773_a4a2eb08-224c-4c6f-a9dc-89cd6810084d.mobileprovision --signing-identity "iPhone Distribution:" 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv repackage-ios -p ios -s standalone_adhoc -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-120773\"" --offline --templates-path /Users/iosbuilder/templates --keychain-path /Users/iosbuilder/Library/Keychains/AppGyver-120773-db --provisioning-profile-path /Users/iosbuilder/current/certs/bs_secrets_120773_a4a2eb08-224c-4c6f-a9dc-89cd6810084d.mobileprovision --signing-identity "iPhone Distribution"

 

The p12 certificate and mobileprovision are correct.
Can you help me solve the error?

Thank you

entry.title: BAPI / Simulate API alternative for BAPI: BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have a requirement to mass create and mass change the price condition data for configurable materials by uploading Excel file, we want to run a simulate/test run before committing the the change/create.

In ECC there is a BAPI : 'BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS'  for create/change and we could commit or rollback the changes once its executed, similarly is there any alternative BAPI or Simulate API for create/change pricing condition before the POST/PUT call in SAP Public cloud.

Thank you in advance

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Supply Chain API

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?

entry.title: Clean core extensibility: what are "types of scope for software (Delivered, Required, Specific)"
entry.content:
In the quiz of the unit "Getting Started with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Extensions, and Clean Core" of the SAP Tutorial Practicing Clean Core Extensibility For SAP S/4HANA Cloud", there is this question and solution:

Question:

Which of the following are different types of scope that exist for software?

Solution:

The different types of scope that exist for software are Delivered, Required, and Specific.

What does it mean? Is it a screen field? Of which application? What is the lesson corresponding to this question? Do you have any documentation link about it?

Thank you.

Sandra

NB: bonus question, is

entry.title: Re: Author Spotlight: Shaik Azmathulla - January 2025 Edition

entry.title: New Learning Journey: Utilizing SAP CX AI Toolkit for SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm Charis from SAP CX Product Learning team and I am excited to announce the launch of our brand new learning journey:

Utilizing the SAP CX AI Toolkit in SAP Commerce Cloud

This learning journey provides a comprehensive overview of SAP CX AI Toolkit for SAP Commerce Cloud persona. It seeks to empower learners to deploy intelligent automation with the SAP CX AI Toolkit and create an engaging smart shopping experience for customers.

Learning Objectives:

  • Describe the role of the SAP CX AI Toolkit within the SAP CX portfolio, its key features, and the associated business benefits in SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Perform the essential steps to access the SAP CX AI Toolkit and establish a connection to SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Utilize the essential features of SAP CX AI Toolkit within SAP Commerce Cloud for their business use cases.

The learning journey consists of 3 units:

  • Introducing SAP CX AI Toolkit for SAP Commerce Cloud: A high level introduction to SAP CX AI Toolkit, and its key features for SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Connecting SAP CX AI Toolkit with SAP Commerce Cloud: This unit guides you through accessing your SAP CX AI Toolkit tenant and configuring its integration with SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Navigating SAP CX AI Toolkit Within SAP Commerce Cloud: This unit walks you through using the SAP CX AI Toolkit within SAP Commerce Cloud to generate product attributes and descriptions, search product data with natural language and image recognition, enhance or create product images, and generate marketing content such as social media posts, blog entries, and product banner text.

The learning journey contains very informative content provided in text, diagrams, videos. At the end of each unit, you will be called to answer on quiz questions which will test your understanding on the topic.

The Learning Journey is available for everyone and it's free! Complete this learning journey and earn a verifiable SAP Authorized Badge on your learning profile!

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have successfully connected the Cloud ALM with Analytics Cloud to get more detailed analytics from an implementation project. We can see the tables (e.g. requirements, tasks, tests) etc in SAC, but we haven't been able to figure out where the associations are stored.

For example we like to query all the requirements and see all tasks associated to them. Can anyone help us and let us know where the associations between the tables are held?

Thanks

Thomas

We are facing the exact same problem with a process order that should be settled in December 2024. The system is rejecting it and only accepting it in January 2025.

entry.title: Re: Payment xml file rejection by Bank - OrgnlPmtInfId>NOTMAPPED</OrgnlPmtInfId
entry.content:
SEPA only supports EUR not USD. Are you using the CGI file?

 

Also check your file on SWIFT in the MyStandards test suite

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
@Chedva it is wonderful to meet you in the community. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia.

May I ask your area of interests and expertise? Please be sure to check out the many interest groups and join the engagement e.g., Application Development - SAP Community

Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit-upgraded to release 202...
entry.content:
Hello,

You may be unable to see the objects due to updates in the latest SAP S/4HANA release. Generally, a project should be associated with a single version of SAP S/4HANA. After an upgrade, it is advisable to create a new project.

 

Regards,

Jose M.

entry.title: Re: Generation of dependent programs/objects (where-used)
entry.content: Understood, apologizes. Yes, the concept of where-used lists and ABAP Load regeneration is different (cross-reference information are stored in different tables and generated by different programs).

entry.title: Trial Integration Suite in Singapore has deployment issues when using security material
entry.content:
Hi,

Since the past two days I've had problems with deployment of integration flows that uses security material.

Even a simple flow using basic authentication HTTP request-reply fails to deploy. The error returned is:

[CONTENT]
[CONTENT_DEPLOY]
[ErrorUnresolvedDependency] : 
{
    "message": "ERROR",
    "childMessageInstances": [
        {
            "message": "EXCEPTION",
            "parameters": [
                "java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException"
            ]
        },
        {
            "message": "UNRESOLVED",
            "parameters": [
                "(&(keystore=default)(objectClass=com.sap.esb.security.KeyCertificateAccessor))"
            ]
        },
        {
            "message": "UNRESOLVED",
            "parameters": [
                "(objectClass=com.sap.esb.camel.http.ahc.configurer.AHCConfigFactory)"
            ]
        }
    ]
}

The tenant I use is in a newly created trial subaccount hosted in Singapore on Azure.

Is anyone else experiencing the same problem?

Best regards,
Jacob

entry.title: Re: Generation of dependent programs/objects (where-used)
entry.content:
The program name is TOUCHTAB.

You may also use SGEN with a transport request containing LIMU TABD MARA.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit-upgraded to release 202...

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to extract the PO Long Text from Material Master...
entry.content:
I have checked our internal systems of 2502 for a CDS view in how to extract the PO Long Text from Material master and this currently not available. 

There is an work around with API that will allow this SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

But if you would like this added a feature request will need to be raised. KBA: 2963059 ( https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2963059 ).

entry.title: Re: How to configure the Change record and capture the changes done in master data
entry.content: Have they been done with a change number that has been generated out of the Change Record "Change Number Handling" that was configured? No Let me try and confirm. I thought ER itself is enough to record the changes. Also I used Impact analysis button in Change record app. Will try to configure the impact analyze model. Pls share if there are links on process flow to record the changes against ECN and ER

Can someone shed some light on how to get this to work correctly?

entry.title: SAC Backend-Login Popup changed to Browser Dropdown
entry.content:
Dear Community

Recently a login behavior has changed in the SAC. This is about the standard SAC internal popup when logging in to a backend system via live connection without SSO, since recently and only on a specific SAC tenant the user details are now requested with a browser Dropdown.

As it used to be:

How it is now:

 

any idea why?

Backend is S4 private Cloud

SAP Analytics Cloud 

Greetings Cornelius

entry.title: MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK writes change log without change
entry.content:
hello SAP brains,

Recently I wrote a WebService (oDataV2) to perform material master updates from an external system. More precisely, an update of the MRP group (MARC-DISGR). This update is carried out via the MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK module. We now have the following problem that this change document writes, but we have no change to MARC. Have you ever encountered similar problems or are there any solutions / explanations?

 

    call function 'MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK' "#EC CI_USAGE_OK[2438006]
      exporting
        flag_muss_pruefen   = 'X'
        p_kz_no_warn        = 'N'
        kz_prf              = space
        user                = sy-uname
        suppress_array_read = 'X'
        flg_mass            = 'X'
        kz_dispo            = 'X'
        call_mode           = ''
        sperrmodus          = 'E'
      tables
        amara_ueb           = it_mara_ueb
        amarc_ueb           = it_marc_ueb
        amerrdat            = rt_return
      exceptions
        kstatus_empty       = 1
        tkstatus_empty      = 2
        t130m_error         = 3
        internal_error      = 4
        too_many_errors     = 5
        update_error        = 6
        error_message       = 98
        others              = 99.

    lt_mara_ueb = value #(
      for <ls_mara> in lt_mrp_group
      where ( error is initial )
      ( matnr = <ls_mara>-matnr
        tcode = 'MM02'
        tranc = <ls_mara>-tranc )
    ).

    lt_marc_ueb = value #(
      for <ls_mara> in lt_mrp_group
      where ( error is initial )
      ( matnr = <ls_mara>-matnr
        werks = <ls_mara>-werks
        disgr = <ls_mara>-disgr
        tranc = <ls_mara>-tranc )
    ).

entry.title: Re: EWM : RF skip cursor movement and move to next screen
entry.content: But dont you want scan the HU? If not then this can be achieved by setting up the Verification control in IMG. This can then be also be setup together with warehouse process types.

entry.title: How to fetch the document from Document Management Service using API's in SAP CAP application?
entry.content:
We have a PDF's which are stored in BTP Document Management Service in which we are using the API https://api.sap.com/api/DownloadFileApi/tryout to read the contents of the PDF.

The output/result on querying DMS to the service returns the result in gibberish manner. As shown below 

 

 

The requirement is to have the output in human readable format which we again need to pass to GenAI for further processing. Could you please help/guide us how can we have the results in human readable text/string. Unfortunately, we tried node.js libraries to parse the query result content but were unsuccessful doing so.

Can anyone suggest how to resolve this?

entry.content:

Cause your description of the issue sounds like a simple mistake in the logic of handling the test/prod mode flag which you can test very easily by running the report in the debugger (works in prod environment too 😉 ).

entry.title: Re: Rest Receiver Adapter - Multipart/Form-data - SAP PO
entry.content: Something like that

entry.title: Are you looking for administration and configuration tools to manage Concur Request. Concur Request?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Getting Started with Concur Request Professional for Administrators learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey is designed to to introduce you to the common administration and configuration tools, to manage Concur Request. Concur Request is a powerful tool that allows users to document and preauthorize upcoming expenses before they occur. This allows for better budgeting and allocation of funds. Concur Request accommodates both travel and non-travel related expenses.

Learning objectives
Upon completion of this learning journey, administrators will be able to administer and configure Concur Request using common tools such as List Management, Audit Rules, Email Reminders, and more. 

Prerequisites

  • Administrators should have a firm understanding of how Concur Request works as a business user.
    Review the learning journey, Getting Started with Concur Professional Request for Business Users, before completing this learning journey.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Override first date for individual items in a sales o...
entry.content: What you suggested is not standard but a customized validation.

entry.title: Re: DMC POD Plugin local development environment in VS Code
entry.content:
Hi @zaunerd ,

Use below code to call the production process while running the application locally. This will automatically route to correct destination when plugin running in the DM POD.

let paylod = {
 plant: this.getPlant()
//add other parameters
}
this.post('pe/api/v1/process/processDefinitions/start', paylod).then(res=>{
  console.log(res)
})

Please install latest version of dmc-local-app-router using command `npm i -g dmc-local-app-router@latest`

you might already have below route details configured in your local-configs.json file. if not add them

{
       "[dev]":{
        "port": 8086,
        "routes": [
            {
                "route": "/api/:servicePath*",
                "uri": "https://api.test.eu20.dmc.cloud.sap",
                "auth": "papiAuth"
            }
        ],
        "auths": {
            "papiAuth": {
                "authUrl": "<token_url>/oauth/token",
                "clientId": "<clientid>",
                "clientSecret": "<client_secret>"
            }
        }
       }
    }

update your package.json file start command with latest command

"start": "dmclar start --profile dev"
for more details on latest version of dmc-local-app-router, refer documentation

entry.title: Which API can be used to create Service Package (ESLH and ESLL) related to Contract (EKKO and EKPO)
entry.content:
Hi,

Which API can be used in S4 on-premise system to create Service Package (tables ESLH and ESLL) related to Contract (tables EKKO and EKPO). I'm trying to use API_SERVICE_CONTRACT_SRV but it is not working as expected, it's returning empty responses with status 200.

entry.title: How to determine the RFC type
entry.content: Hello, how to determine the RFC type currently used in the system if it is Asynchronous, Synchronous, etc. Which tcode should i check?

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content:
Hi @diego_renzi,

this issue is often based on a missing content configuration in the SAP Build Apps HTML5 application. Specifically, the `semanticObject` and `action` parameters are often missing. These parameters are not strictly required in the CDM content in all cases and therefore are not mandatory in SAP Build Apps. However, they are necessary for successful integration between SAP Build Work Zone and SAP Mobile Start for HTML5 Apps.

Here's some additional context to clarify why your apps work in the SAP Build Work Zone Web Client but not in SAP Mobile Start:

  • In the Web Client: HTML5 Apps are launched with the `embedded` launch type, meaning they run within the same shell (unlike when launched in a new browser tab). In this scenario, `semanticObject` and `action` are not required.
  • In SAP Mobile Start: The `embedded` launch type is not supported, as the native app lacks a web shell it runs in. When no native app is unavailable (which is the case here), HTML5 Apps are launched with the `central` launch type, which opens a new web shell and requires `semanticObject` and `action` to be injected into the shell for the app to run. Without these parameters, the app cannot launch in this setup.

Adding the `semanticObject` and `action` parameters to the app in SAP Build Apps and refreshing the HTML5 content int the SAP Build Work Zone Content-Channel-Manager should resolve the problem.

I also created the SAP Note 3560911 for that scenario

Best regards,
Sascha Kiefer

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Welcome Chedva!

How are you:)?

I also want to invite you to check out my cooking thread. You will recognize some of the dishes for sure:).

Regards,

Moshe

entry.title: Custom Services UI feature in Sales Service Cloud v2
entry.content:
Hello together,

does anybody know if there is already a sample somewhere with a CAP Service and the uploaded JSON for this feature in Sales Service Cloud v2?

custom serviceui generation

https://www.youtube.com/live/VUp4nt3zNCg?t=4110s 

Thanks and best regards,

Julian

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba integration with SAGE ERP (Third Party)
entry.content:
You will have to use CIG integration in Mediated Connectivity i.e via a middleware.

  • Outbound document (SAGE to Ariba): custom dev to provide this doc payload (Master Data, PO ack, GR Ack etc...) in CIG format 
  • Inbound Document (Ariba to SAGE): CIG will transform the Ariba cxml document into a xml document like, then in your middleware, you can transform these documents into the format supported by your SAGE

It is doable, but you need to have a good team of developer, Also one of the option bypassing CIG, is to use the different webservices (https://help.sap.com/doc/631084d43b6a4216b391ec37ce94733b/cloud/en-US/ws_index.htm) or API (https://api.sap.com/products/SAPAriba/apis/all) that Ariba has.

entry.title: Re: Comprehensive Guide to Unit Testing in CAP
entry.content:
Thanks for it. 

Really interesting. I applied it successfully in one project, definitely I'm going to use it. But, the point is that the coverage is got from the testing scripts. How can I manage the coverage of custom handlers? There is a way? 

Thank you

entry.title: CJCF Carry Forward Committment
entry.content:
Dear all,

We are trying to carry forward a project commitment from 2023 to 2024. However, the system is updating both the commitment column and the remaining order value column to the extent of the commitment amount in 2024, which is strange and also the assigned value is incorrect in S/4 Hana system.

It Would be highly appriciate  for any input on this issue.

Thanks .

V.Krishnamoorthy

entry.title: Re: Performance is poor for Select query on MBEW Table
entry.content:
Hi, Prince

I think nobody helps you. We have the same problems with view MBV_MBEW.

To get a stock for single material and for all plants where material exists system need 30 seconds that is very poor performance, and we didn't use for all entries clause in query. I created CDS which return needed information from MBV_MBEW and performance is very bad. I did little investigation and noticed that fields salk3 and lbkum are calculated from accdoca extract on the fly, that is cause and you can't do anything with that.

entry.title: Re: List of object types - SAP Business One
entry.content: Great . Thanks

entry.title: Re: Embedded Reports in SAP Cloud for Customer
entry.content:
Hello,

I found this possibility in Ticket part, but not in sales quote.

Is this functionality available in Sales Quote?

Thanks

entry.title: HCM_CATS_V1_B_TS_VALIDATION
entry.content:
Hi all

We want to limit the maximum number of hours per day or per week in the "manage my timesheet" app, using the BAdI HCM_CATS_V1_B_TS_VALIDATION. 

Once you do a Save & Submit, the time entries are written to the database. Then when you then add new time entries, internal table "timeentries" only contains these new time entries - not those time entries already saved to the database. 

Example: you enter a time entry for 6:30 then Submit (time entries will contain just this one record). Then enter a further time entry for 2:30 and Submit (again timeentries will contain just this one record). So, there will be no error message for exceeded hours.

To meet our business requirement, the custom logic needs to be enhanced to also check for existing time entries on the database and adding these to the calculation of lv_totalhours. For this you can use CDS View I_TIMESHEETRECORD and read records based on PERNR / WORKDATE.

Does anyone have example coding for this scenario? And how can you involve the maximum number of hours that was maintained in the "manage workforce" app for a certain user? 

In the post https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/badi-hcm-cats-v1-b-ts-validation/qaq-p/12349770 is mentioned that BAdI HCM_CATS_V1_B_TS_VALIDATION checks and validates only the duration of the last single timesheet entry. It was planned for release 2005 (Q2/2020) the BAdI will be enhanced to check and validate against all the timesheet entries for the day. Anyone who knows if this is done or when this will be enabled? 

Thanks! 

Best regards, 
Annelies

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting - Need help to configure Group Journal Entry approver workflow on premise
entry.content: Thanks Dana_Pu, I managed to set up the workflow now, but the workflow item is not reaching the Group Journal approval inbox of the team member. Does the Group Journal Approver need a specific role assigned to receive the workflow item? If yes, what is it called?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 is now available.

To access the final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access it.

For you as a customer, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

You can use the commenting feature for What’s New. With this feature, authors can evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: Re: DM Core Plugin Extension - how to avoid deploying all...
entry.content:
Hello Deep,

In the Core Plugin Extension, there is a folder called designer in Plugins. Inside this folder, there is a component.json file. In this file, in the extensions>inclusions section, you specify in which plants and Pods each plugin that will be extended will be active. With the right settings, you will have solved your problem.

Best Regards,

Emre Yoldas

entry.title: Where can I learn to develop and monitor interfaces and execute error handling in a single framework
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Managing SAP Application Interface Framework learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey presents SAP Application Interface Framework (AIF) and provides an in-depth knowledge of managing complex application interfaces and handling errors with a high level of customization. It empowers learners to monitor and map both inbound and outbound IDocs and proxies, use the file adapter, and explore advanced features revolving around interface variants and simplified application.
Applicable for S/4HANA and S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, developers will be able to:

  • Understanding how to customize and effectively use the error handling capabilities of AIF.
  • Gaining proficiency in the creation of interfaces using AIF.
  • Learning how to use AIF specific monitoring tools.
  • Understanding the use and advantage of AIF Index Tables
  • Developing skills to monitor and map both inbound and outbound IDocs.
  • Learning how to monitor and map both inbound and outbound Proxies.
  • Understanding and using the file adapter.
  • Gaining knowledge on interface determination and its usage.
  • Understanding and implementing interface variants.
  • Learning to use the analyzer effectively in AIF.

Prerequisites
Recommended

  • ABAP knowledge 
  • Experience with integration scenarios

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Embedded Reports in SAP Cloud for Customer
entry.content: Yes, this functionality also available for Sales Quote:

entry.title: ICMR - Manage Assignments values different from Reconciliation Balances
entry.content:
Hello all,

I'm currently trying to figure out the ICMR process. The configuration has been made, but I'm not currently understanding the meaning of the values showed on the apps "Reconciliation Balances" and "Manage Assignments", per example:

1- The only column I have configured to be shown is "Up to Now (YTD)" which should accumulate all the values from January to December. But on December it's only showing me the December value + November value, disregarding the values from January to October.

2- In December per example, on Reconciliation Balances app, my Leading Unit amount is 20.000€, same as my Partner Unit, resulting on a 0€ difference. But if I jump to the Manage Assignments app, and select the all unassigned documents from both my Leading and Partner Unit, i have a difference of 202,96€. Shouldn't this difference be represented on the previous app, since the column "Up to Now (YTD)" aggregates all values from the beginning to the end of the year?

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Monte Carlo Simulation
entry.content:
Hi @MickeyM ,

Glad to see that you are excited to try compass out!

Regarding your questions:

  1. Compass supports relationships defined between KPIs via the account dimension formula or hierarchy, and the formulas defined via calculated measures in model. Data Actions are currently not supported but it is an area which we are looking into.
  2. The prediction results meant are actually the results which are written back into a planning model from a predictive scenario. (There is no integration direct integration between predictive scenarios and compass). As compass simulates straight off a SAC model, it is possible for user to chose the predicted result in the planning model as the data version to be used for the compass simulation. 

    As explained in the blog, time series prediction works differently from a compass (Monte Carlo) simulation, hence when considering which influences/drivers to use in each case, the business intention behind should be the decisive criteria, i.e. in time series prediction: "which influencers will help to give more accuracy to the future projection if things develop at the same rate/cycle", and for compass: "What happens if things change for certain drivers within a given range?".
    Whether the same driver could be used for both cases is technically dependent on (1) whether there is enough historical data for time series prediction and (2) whether it is also defined in a mathematical relationship for compass simulation. But the first business / conceptual question here should be the "why should the same drivers be used" and "what are the results sought".

Hope this helps!

Cheers,
Chen Nee

entry.title: Hi allCustomer did a client copy from Production server to create a new pre production system
entry.content: After copy users start testing and they realized workflows, rules, substitutions and maybe other things are missed. How can I know what else is missed on the copy and how can I solve missing workflows and rules?

entry.title: Re: FAGLL03H- Material G/L - Material group column not showing in G/L line Item #fagll03h
entry.content: (HANA) field is ACDOCA-MATKL_MM

entry.title: Re: MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK writes change log without change
entry.content:
Please check if SAP-KBA can provide a solution or explanation for your issue.
KBAs 3351985 - Change document update problems for long text in Material/Article Master - SAP for Me and 3440880 - Incorrect change documents for MARC-STAWN and MARC-EXPME - SAP for Me provide some more information ...

Hope this helps

Nic T.

entry.content:

When I change the URL endpoint on Soamanager I get the below error:

When I try to create a completely new logical port and provide the endpoint of this WS, I get the below error:

Any idea, hint? 

Thank you,

Doris

entry.title: Is Resource Scheduling Job possible to schedule for more tahn 2 months
entry.content:
While scheduling a job using Manage Schedule App>Generate Recurring Schedule in SAP S4 Public cloud while setting the schedule getting an error cannot schedule for a duration of more than 2 months.

 

Do anyone has any idea is this a system condition by default in S4 public cloud and can we change it by anyways.

 

Any help will be highly appreciated.
